<!--
  Standard Verne PR. Keep it tight; sacrifice grammar for concision.
  Delete sections that don't apply (e.g. Root cause for a pure feature).
-->

## Problem
<!-- What's broken or missing, and how it surfaces to a user/dev. -->

## Root cause
<!-- Why it happens. Omit for pure features/chores. -->

## Fix
<!-- What this PR changes, and why this approach. -->

## Test
<!-- Tests added/changed. Note if none and why. -->

## Verification
<!-- Commands run + results (typecheck / test / build / cargo). Manual steps if UI. -->

## Notes
<!-- Trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots, anything a reviewer should know. -->
